name: Assessment Invitation
response:
Dear {{ applicant_name }},
You have been invited to complete an assessment as part of your application.
{{ instructions }}
Once you click Start, you have {{ time_limit_label }}. The assessment submits automatically when time runs out.
Please use the link below. It is personal to you and can be submitted only once.
The deadline to complete it is {{ deadline }}.
Start Assessment
If the button does not work, copy this link into your browser:{{ link }}
Good luck!
response_html:
Dear {{ applicant_name }},

You have been invited to complete an assessment as part of your application.

{% if instructions %}
{{ instructions }}
{% endif %}

⏱ Once you click Start, you have {{ time_limit_label }}. The assessment submits automatically when time runs out.

Please use the link below. It is personal to you and can be submitted only once. The deadline to complete it is {{ deadline }}.

Start Assessment

If the button does not work, copy this link into your browser:
{{ link }}

Good luck!
subject: You have been invited to complete an assessment
